summary: Implemented two-key theme switching for sioyek: w for Gruvbox light (day mode) and Shift+w for Nord dark (night mode). Cleaned up 7 invalid configuration options, added theme macros using setconfig commands, and created keys configuration file.

artifacts.summary: Updated with theme macros and cleaned of invalid options
New keybindings file with w and Shift+w theme shortcuts

completion_data.completion_summary: Implemented two-key sioyek theme switching using runtime setconfig macros. Cleaned 7 invalid config options, added _gruvbox and _nord macros, created sioyek-keys.config with w/Shift+w keybindings.

next_steps: Manual testing: open sioyek with a PDF and verify w/Shift+w toggle between Gruvbox light and Nord dark themes
